title: Glued Trees
subtitle: Glued Trees Algorithm
description: Demonstrates the quantum speedup for the glued trees problem: given oracular access to a graph of two mirrored binary trees whose leaves are connected, find the exit node starting from the entrance node. The algorithm models the graph as a Hamiltonian simulation problem and uses Classiq's exponentiation function to evolve through the structure — an example of an exponential quantum speedup with no known efficient classical solution.
